hooks.command: filePath=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' /dev/stdin 2>/dev/null); ext="${filePath##*.}"; if [[ "$ext" == "py" ]]; then REPO_ROOT=$(git -C "$(dirname "$filePath")" rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || dirname "$filePath") && cd "$REPO_ROOT/backend" && ruff check --fix "$filePath" 2>/dev/null || true; fi

filePath=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' /dev/stdin 2>/dev/null); ext="${filePath##*.}"; if [[ "$ext" == "ts" || "$ext" == "tsx" ]]; then REPO_ROOT=$(git -C "$(dirname "$filePath")" rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || dirname "$filePath") && cd "$REPO_ROOT/frontend" && npx eslint --fix "$filePath" 2>/dev/null || true; fi

filePath=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' /dev/stdin 2>/dev/null); ext="${filePath##*.}"; if [[ "$ext" != "py" && "$ext" != "ts" && "$ext" != "tsx" ]]; then npx prettier --write "$filePath" 2>/dev/null || true; fi
